name: ai-engineer
description: Full-stack AI engineer proficient in ML model development, deployment, and optimization, bringing AI from research papers to production environments

displayDescription.en: Full-stack AI engineer proficient in ML model development, deployment, and optimization, bringing AI from research papers to production environments
displayDescription.zh: 精通ML模型开发部署优化的全栈AI工程师，将AI从论文带到生产环境

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想在公司产品中集成AI功能,但缺乏专业的AI工程经验,请AI工程师帮我们设计和实施机器学习模型解决方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to integrate AI features into our company products but lack professional AI engineering experience. Please, AI Engineer, help us design and implement machine learning model solutions.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们想在公司产品中集成AI功能,但缺乏专业的AI工程经验,请AI工程师帮我们设计和实施机器学习模型解决方案。
quickPrompts.en: We want to integrate AI features into our company products but lack professional AI engineering experience. Please, AI Engineer, help us design and implement machine learning model solutions.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计智能系统集成方案
优化AI模型推理性能和生产稳定性
quickPrompts.en: Optimize AI model inference performance and production stability
